summary.label: Less future roads
summary.notes: Future roads are long-term land-base context, not current THLB. Because future road alignments are unknown, P9RF implements this row as an aspatial area netdown proxy using smallest-current resultant fragments to approximate the MP11 net deduction. The deducted fragments are an area accounting placeholder and must not be interpreted as predicted future road locations.

layers.active_fragments: retained resultant fragments after this step
